import io
import string

data TokenNode
  token: String
  mut count: Int
  mut next: Option<TokenNode>
end

data TokenList
  mut head: Option<TokenNode>
  mut tail: Option<TokenNode>
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn record(_ list: TokenList, _ tok: String) -> Unit
  mut cur = list.head
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match cur
    when Some(node)
      if node.token == tok
        mut n = node
        n.count = n.count + 1
        done = true
      else
        cur = node.next
      end
    when None
      let new_node = TokenNode(token: tok, count: 1, next: None)
      match list.tail
      when Some(t)
        mut tm = t
        tm.next = Some(new_node)
      when None
        mut lh = list
        lh.head = Some(new_node)
      end
      mut lt = list
      lt.tail = Some(new_node)
      done = true
    end
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(text)
let list = TokenList(head: None, tail: None)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut in_tok = false
while i < total
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if in_tok
        record(list, current)
        current = ""
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      in_tok = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_tok
  record(list, current)
end

mut best_tok = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut cur = list.head
mut scan_done = false
while not scan_done
  match cur
  when Some(node)
    if node.count > best_count
      best_tok = node.token
      best_count = node.count
    end
    cur = node.next
  when None
    scan_done = true
  end
end

println("top=#{best_tok}=#{best_count}")
